tools.name: search_hub
tools.description: Search tasks, games, watchlist, apps, and events by name.

tools.name: get_hub_item
tools.description: Get details for a hub item by type and id.

tools.name: create_reminder
tools.description: Create a reminder, optionally linked to an event/task/game/watch/app.

tools.name: create_event_with_reminder
tools.description: Create a calendar event and an optional linked reminder in one step.

tools.name: update_game
tools.description: Update a game in Media by search query.

tools.name: update_watch
tools.description: Update a watchlist item by search query.

tools.name: open_app_folder
tools.description: Open a registered app project folder in Explorer.

tools.name: open_app_in_cursor
tools.description: Open a registered app project folder in Cursor IDE.
